name: This is a Hotfix
short_description: Notes on React, React Native, JS, and some other things.
about_me_p1: Hi, my name is Verónica Clavijo (<0>Vero</0> or <1>Veuge</1>). I have been working as a Developer since 2017, mainly on projects in the United States and Europe. I mainly work with Javascript, React and React Native. Looking to be Fullstack.
about_me_p2: Welcome to my <0>digital garden</0>, here I will try to write my learnings from day to day, personal projects and miscellaneous. Nothing here is in its final version, everything is in constant evolution and I will try to update the contents in that way.
